examples: The Study of Potassium Phenoxide-1, 3, 5-trinitrobenzene Charge Transfer Complexes.
High molecular weight linear products were regenerated after the ring-opening polymerization of the cyclo-products using potassium phenoxide as initiator.
The method could be divided into "active phenoxide" routing and "active cyanogen" routing according to the actual monomer synthesis process, as well as each reaction mechanism is discussed.
